E(M)end,function(W,a)local E=j(a)local D=function(D,v,Y,R)return Z(W,{D,v;Y;R},a,E)end return D end return(L(-753544+11944714,{}))(E(M))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[a(-539409-(-508399))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
